ValidationRule.description: Work Order cannot move to In Progress until Site Readiness Check passes all 6 criteria, or COO waives.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Status = "In Progress", PRIORVALUE(Status) = "Site Readiness Check", NOT(Site_Ready_Overall__c), NOT(Site_Readiness_Status__c = "Waived (COO Only)") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All 6 site readiness checks must pass before moving to In Progress. If a check fails: pull the job from the schedule and contact the builder. COO override required for any waiver — do not change status without approval.
